intent: We are not building the Forge Agent architecture. We are building a Mac Consensus Deve Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture.
scope_statement:
Build the complete Consensus Dev Agent — a native macOS AI coding agent with a two-process architecture (Swift shell + Python backend) that uses dual-LLM consensus (Claude + GPT-4o with Claude arbitrating) to autonomously decompose build intents into ordered PRDs and PRs, generate implementation and tests via parallel consensus generation, run 3-pass review cycles, execute CI, and gate on operator approval before merging. The system encompasses all 12 TRD-specified subsystems: macOS Application Shell (TRD-1), Consensus Engine (TRD-2), Build Pipeline with 8 stages and 3-pass review (TRD-3), Multi-Agent Coordination via BuildLedger (TRD-4), GitHub Integration Layer (TRD-5), Holistic Code Review with 5 lenses (TRD-6), TRD Development Workflow with 8-phase facilitation (TRD-7), UI/UX Design System (TRD-8), Mac CI Runner Infrastructure (TRD-9), Document Store with FAISS vector retrieval (TRD-10), Security Threat Model enforcement (TRD-11), Backend Runtime Startup and Version Handshake (TRD-12), and Recovery/State Management (TRD-13). All subsystems are governed by the security controls in TRD-11 (SEC-CRED-*, SEC-CTX-*, SEC-CODE-*, SEC-LOG-*) and must conform to the two-process isolation boundary where Swift never calls LLM APIs and Python never reads Keychain directly.

Clarifications:
  - finalize the spec in the PRDs
  - rename to the best approach and make consistent through out the PRDs\
  - optimize based on best practices in the PRDs
  - include this as an ask in the PRDs
  - still being determined
  - Determine the very best implementation order for the PRDs to ensure that the code development is maximum efficient

Consensus Generation Core and Provider Arbitration Engine

Three-Pass Build Review and Fix Loop Execution
Multi-Agent Build Ledger and Team Coordination
Holistic Code Review Workflow with Five Lenses
TRD Development Workflow and Specification Authoring Engine
Native macOS Application Shell, Operator Experience, and Secure Secret Management
macOS Design System, Build Stream UX, and Specialized Workflow Views
Mac CI Runner Infrastructure, Swift Validation, Signing, and Release Pipeline
